recommendations.title: Night of the Living Dead
recommendations.overview: A ragtag group barricade themselves in an old Pennsylvania farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls ravaging the Northeast.

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: During an ever-growing epidemic of zombies that have risen from the dead, two Philadelphia SWAT team members, a traffic reporter, and his television-executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall.

recommendations.title: Martin
recommendations.overview: A young man, convinced he's a vampire, goes to live with his elderly and hostile cousin in a small Pennsylvanian town, where he tries to suppress his bloodlust.

recommendations.title: Bruiser
recommendations.overview: After years of being browbeaten and walked on, a man wakes one day wearing an expressionless mask, fitted with a personality that enables him to take revenge.

recommendations.title: Diary of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of young filmmakers encounter real zombies while filming a horror movie of their own.

recommendations.title: Land of the Dead
recommendations.overview: The living dead have taken over the world, and the remaining humans live in a walled city to protect themselves as they cope with the situation.

recommendations.title: Creepshow
recommendations.overview: Five grisly tales from a 1950s-style comic, including a murdered father rising from beyond, a bizarre meteor, a vengeful husband, a mysterious crate's occupant, and a plague of cockroaches.

recommendations.title: The Amusement Park
recommendations.overview: An elderly gentleman goes for what he assumes will be an ordinary day at the amusement park, only to find himself in the midst of a hellish nightmare.

recommendations.title: The Crazies
recommendations.overview: The military attempts to contain a manmade virus causing death and permanent insanity in those infected, as it overtakes a small Pennsylvania town.

recommendations.title: The Dark Half
recommendations.overview: Following the public's realization that Thad Beaumont and George Stark are one and the same, the former stages a mock funeral, only for a series of gruesome murders to begin occurring as in his books.
